arts.sum: Lens held out to secure a 1-0 win over Saint-Etienne last weekend to make it three wins from their last four. The narrow victory means they have won back-to-back home games. Reims, meanwhile, saw the...

arts.ttl: Official | Jonathan Gradit extends at Lens
arts.sum: Jonathan Gradit (32) has extended his contract at RC Lens. The Frenchman is now linked to the club until 2028. Amid interest from Stade Rennais, the player’s agent went public…
